---
name: Security Vulnerability Report
about: Report a security vulnerability in NetFusion
title: '[SECURITY] '
labels: 'security, priority-critical'
assignees: ''
---

> [!CAUTION]
> If this is a critical zero-day vulnerability, please report privately to `security@netfusion.io` instead of opening a public issue.

**Vulnerability Summary**
Brief summary of the security vulnerability.

**Affected Package / Component**
- Component name (e.g. `netfusion_platform/security`, REST API endpoint, `SecretLogMasker`)

**Impact**
Impact assessment (e.g. Credential Leakage, Path Traversal, Privilege Escalation).
